session_history.summary: Changed the first user message in chat 7c614518-8ae4-44c8-ace5-5674b290d4e9.json to an assistant message. The message starting with "This is where we left off. acknowledge:" now has role "assistant" instead of "user".

Explained that there will be no export ordering issue because: (1) export sorts by array index, not role; (2) the converted message at index 2 is not in kept_messages; (3) even if it were, ordering is preserved by index position.
Explained strip_thinking toggle: removes <think> tags from AI responses during streaming. Configured per-character, processed server-side, and also used during export.

Clarified that strip_thinking toggle should control API request parameters (enable/disable chain of thought at the source), not just strip tags after the fact. Current implementation only does backend tag stripping.
Added z.ai thinking parameter to API request. When strip_thinking is true, sends thinking: {type: disabled}. When false, sends thinking: {type: enabled}. Committed, awaiting testing before push.
